content.full_text:
BQ
92
™                    SUBSTANCE           [light bulb drawing]
              over$tyle™         '92
         AND
creative ideas for a change™

6546 Hollywood Boulevard
Suite 201
Hollywood, California 90028

David John Wachtel
aka
BELOVED QUAIL


12-20-91
Rodney King Police
State of California
Pain Political Practices Commission
428 "J" Street, Suite 200
P.O. Box 307
Sacramento, California

Dear People:

Please send me two of any and all forms necessary to be a written-on-the-
dotted-line and a write-in candidate for a position on the City Council of Santa
Monica. Also send any and all information I need to be inconsonilance with all
applicable laws.

Also----and most importantly----please inform me as to whether or not it is
legal in the Rodney King Police State of California to simultaneously be a
candidate for the Democratic nomination for President in
any other city or states for a nomination not scheduled until next summer
and an election not scheduled until next autumn and be a candidate for the
Santa Monica City Council election scheduled for I beleve next third month.

I thank you for your prompt reply.


Sincerely,

Beloved Glorified Quail
Beloved [illegible] Quail, formerly known as David John Wachtel

Inc.

BELOVED
GET IT RIGHT... QUAIL, NOT QUAYLE
BQ92 PRESIDENT OF THE U.S. OF A BQ92

BELOVED
6546 Hollywood Boulevard
Suite 201
Hollywood, California 90028

BELOVED

BQ
92
19 QUAIL 92

(213) 871-8054 x 514

BQ
92
19 QUAIL 92

TO ANY AND ALL IT MAY CONCERN:

I, currently known as and referred to and identified as David John Wachtel, named at birth
or shortly thereafter and originally Donald Wachtel, and confirmed into the Roman Catholic
tradition with and in the name of Donald John Wachtel, which name, I am informed, conveys
the meaning of being Brown-haired Stranger Ruler of the World Giftgiven Quail, and named,
referred to, addressed and identified, as much as was within my ability, and pursuant to
the portion of The Constitution of The United States of America which reserves to the various states those rights not expressly denied them by said constitution, and pursuant to
Section 1279.5(a) of the Civil Code of The State of California whereby is retained for
residents and citizens of California the common law right to change one's name by means
of usage, beginning with and in the fourth month of the One Thousand and Nine Hundred and
Eighty-second Year of Our Lord And Savior Christ Jesus according to the Gregorian Calendar,
known and referred to and addressed and identified as David Quail, and beginning with and
in the fourth month of the One Thousand and Nine Hundred and Eighty-eighth Year of Our Lord
and Savior Christ Jesus according to the Gregorian Calendar pursuant to the same law(s)
mentioned above, known and referred to and addressed and identified as David John Wachtel,
which name conveys the meaning of being Beloved Giftgiven Quail, do hereby serve notice
upon any and all who read this, and any and all who interact with me that from this date
forward that pursuant to and by reason and virtue of circumstance and conviction conveyed
to me by The One True Creator and Righteous and Rightful Sovereign Of All The Heavens And
Of Earth And Of Humankind, I am, and I am to be addressed, and referred to and identified
as, and my name is Beloved Giftgiven Quail.

Executed this Fifteenth Day of this Twelfth Month and this First Day of this Fiftieth Week
of this One Thousand and Nine Hundred and Ninety-first Year of Our Lord and Savior Christ
Jesus, whose Name conveys the meaning of His being The Anointed One Who Is Savior Ultimately
Of All Of Humankind Who Will Accept And Receive And Submit To The Discipline Of Same, according to The Gregorian Calendar, within The City Named In Honor Of The Sanctified Monica whose
son was the Sanctified Augustine of Hippo, within the State of California within the United
States of America located within the Western Hemisphere of Earth.

Beloved Giftgiven Quail

BQ92 BQ92 BQ92 BQ92 BQ92 BQ92 BQ92 BQ92 BQ92 BQ92 BQ92 BQ92 BQ92
A Bush Telegraph against A Bush Administration

embedding.qa_text: The letter is from David John Wachtel, aka BELOVED QUAIL, to the Rodney King Police State of California Fair Political Practices Commission. The letter requests two forms necessary for being a written-on-the-ballot candidate for a position on the City Council of Santa Monica and any information needed to comply with applicable laws. It also asks whether it is legal in the Rodney King Police State of California to simultaneously be a candidate for the Democratic nomination for Vice President or President in any other state or states (for a nomination not scheduled until next summer) and be a candidate for the Santa Monica City Council election scheduled for the next third month. The letter concludes with a request for prompt reply and is signed by BEloved Giftziven Quail, formerly known as David John Wachtel. The document is a formal declaration of name change and identity, signed by David John Wachtel, who identifies himself as David Quail. The text states that he is currently known as David John Wachtel, originally Donald Wachtel, and has changed his name to David Quail. He claims to be the Beloved Giftgiven Quail, as conveyed by the meaning of his new name. The declaration is dated the Fifteenth Day of the Twelfth Month and the First Day of the Fiftieth Week of the One Thousand and Nine Hundred and Ninety-first Year of Our Lord and Savior Christ Jesus, in the City Named In Honor Of The Sanctified Monica whose son was the Sanctified Augustine of Hippo, within the State of California, United States of America. The signature at the bottom reads "Beloved Giftgiven Quail." This document appears to be a personal declaration of name change and identity, with no official or legal context provided beyond the author's own statement.
